creator: douglas@douglasthrift.net
text:
Created attachment 179241
www/dtse-1.3_1.diff

Updated MASTER_SITES from apt.douglasthrift.net and code.douglasthrift.net to dl1.douglasthrift.net and dl2.douglasthrift.net.

portlint: OK (0 fatal errors and 7 warnings found.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 103i386, 103amd64)

The warnings are all:

  WARN: ...:  patch was not generated using ``make makepatch''.  It is recommended to use ``make makepatch'' when you need to [re-]generate a patch to ensure proper patch format.

The patches haven't changed and are working as is, so I don't see a need to regenerate them.
